description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build ml-metadata that runs on push to the master branch, on pull requests to master, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow has two jobs: build, which runs on ubuntu-latest with a matrix of Python 3.9, 3.10, and 3.11, checks out the code, and uses a reusable build action; and upload_to_pypi, which runs on ubuntu-latest, depends on the build job, and uploads build artifacts to PyPI when triggered by a release or workflow dispatch event.
